title: Tracing, Evals, and Failure Analysis · Failure Case: Scenario Fixtures
summary: Evaluate a multi-turn tool agent across realistic environments. Planned artifact: Add and verify the loops scenario fixtures increment in an agent trace and evaluation suite. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Build deterministic environments and representative multi-turn cases.
Evaluate action trajectories and state outcomes as well as final text.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
